description_long: This wallet features a striking faux snakeskin pattern in shades of gray, black, and taupe, giving it a luxurious and exotic appearance. The exterior is smooth with a subtle sheen, and the wallet is rectangular with rounded corners. A gold-toned zipper runs along the top and one side, providing secure closure, and is complemented by a matching gold zipper pull. Attached to the zipper pull is a detachable wrist strap made from the same snakeskin-patterned material, allowing for convenient carrying. The wallet appears slim and compact, suitable for holding cash, cards, and small personal items. No visible signs of wear or damage are present, and a small gold logo or insignia is visible on the front center.
description: A slim, rectangular wallet with a faux snakeskin pattern, gold zipper, and detachable wrist strap, featuring a small gold logo on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full snakeskin pattern, gold zipper, and small gold logo at the center.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wallet's slim profile and the gold zipper pull with attached wrist strap.
description_view_2: Back view similar to the front, but without the visible logo; wrist strap attachment is more prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thinness of the wallet and the zipper track.
attribute_brand_logo: A small gold logo or insignia is visible on the front center of the wallet, but the brand name or symbol is not clearly identifiable.
attribute_decorative_pattern: Faux snakeskin pattern in gray, black, and taupe tones covering the entire exterior.
attribute_attachment_or_chain: Detachable wrist strap made of matching snakeskin-patterned material, attached to the zipper pull.
